query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sasboss_pricebook_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  version_label VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  effective_date DATETIME NOT NULL,
  imported_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  source_filename VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  is_active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sasboss_pricebook_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  version_id INT NOT NULL,
  product_id INT,
  sheet_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  product_filter VARCHAR(100),
  buy_name VARCHAR(500),
  product_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  partner_buy_price DECIMAL(10,6),
  partner_sell_price DECIMAL(10,6),
  partner_margin DECIMAL(10,6),
  nfr_partner_price DECIMAL(10,6),
  included_calls_buy DECIMAL(10,6),
  included_calls_sell DECIMAL(10,6),
  bundled_buy DECIMAL(10,6),
  bundled_sell DECIMAL(10,6),
  product_code VARCHAR(100),
  product_type VARCHAR(100),
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (version_id) REFERENCES sasboss_pricebook_versions(id)
);
